data.title: 36,000 ETH transferred from Binance hot wallet to Bybit cold wallet in the past 15 minutes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookonChain monitoring, another 36,000 ETH (worth US$96.5 million) were transferred from Binance hot wallet to Bybit cold wallet in the past 15 minutes.

data.title: Planet Lunch News

Crypto KOL clarifies: The $1.38 billion in funds in the Bybit hacker address are still on the Ethereum mainnet, and the previous cross-chain transfer of funds to Solana was due to misleading by others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto KOL issued a clarification that he was misled by @barneyxbt's post and his previous analysis of Bybit hackers using the Solana network and Kanye Meme coins to launder money was wrong. He said that the ETH funds worth $1.38 billion on the Bybit hacker address are still on the Ethereum mainnet, and he has deleted the previous analysis tweet.

data.title: Clarification Issued on Bybit Hack and Solana Network Misunderstanding
data.description: According to Odaily, a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency community has clarified previous statements regarding the Bybit hack. The individual explained that earlier analyses suggesting the use of the Solana network and Kanye Meme tokens for laundering funds were misleading, influenced by a post from @barneyxbt. It was confirmed that the $1.38 billion in ETH associated with the Bybit hacker remains on the Ethereum mainnet. The initial analysis tweets have since been deleted.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of $62.7725 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 4 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 21, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 62.7725 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of 60.0798 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is 22.106 billion US dollars. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is 1.199 billion US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of 21.6410 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of IBIT reached 40.878 billion US dollars. The second is VanEck ETF HODL, with a single-day net inflow of $4.7112 million. The current total net inflow of HODL has reached $871 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is $110.795 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.88%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $39.556 billion.

data.title: Du Jun supports Bybit, saying he will transfer 10,000 ETH and will not withdraw it within a month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ABCDE co-founder Du Jun posted on the X platform: "Today, 10,000 ETH will be recharged to Bybit, and it will not be withdrawn within a month."

data.title: Ethereum ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 22, Farside Investors reported a net outflow of $8.9 million from U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs. This outflow was solely attributed to Bitwise's ETHW, while other ETFs recorded no net inflow or outflow.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $8.9166 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 3.14%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 21, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 8.9166 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a daily net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.998 billion US dollars. Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a daily net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 9.981 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.154 billion US dollars.
